novel_features.name: Claim-token vault + auto-claim
novel_features.description: Every anonymous publish records its slug, claim token, and 24h expiry into a local vault, so you can make an expiring site permanent later without hunting for the token in terminal scrollback.
novel_features.rationale: The claim token is returned exactly once at anonymous-publish time and never again by any API; only a local store can persist it to drive a later claim.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this when an agent publishes anonymously and needs to keep the site — the token to do so exists nowhere else.

novel_features.name: Expiry radar
novel_features.description: Lists anonymous sites expiring within a time window so you can claim them before they vanish.
novel_features.rationale: Anonymous-expiry countdown is a pure local time-window query over the vault; no API endpoint reports 'expiring soon'.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Run this before anonymous sites silently expire at 24h to catch the ones worth keeping.

novel_features.name: Publish resume
novel_features.description: Detects a locally-recorded publish that uploaded its files but never finalized, and completes it instead of re-publishing from scratch.
novel_features.rationale: Recovery requires the in-flight upload state that only the CLI persisted locally during the original publish.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when a publish half-failed (uploads done, finalize missed) to finish it without burning publish-rate budget on a redo.

novel_features.name: Drive sync (sha256 diff)
novel_features.description: Rsync-style sync of a local directory to a Drive: compares local sha256 against the synced file checksums and uploads only what changed, new, or deleted.
novel_features.rationale: The API offers per-file PUT but no diff; computing drift requires a local mirror of each DriveFile's sha256.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this instead of re-uploading a whole folder — it only sends drift, saving rate budget and time.

novel_features.name: Drive diff
novel_features.description: Shows which local files differ from a Drive (added, changed, deleted) without uploading anything.
novel_features.rationale: Read-only local-vs-remote comparison over the synced drive table; no single API call expresses 'what differs from this folder'.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to preview exactly what a sync would change before committing to the upload.

novel_features.name: Free-plan usage meter
novel_features.description: Local rollup of site count, drive bytes, and recent publish cadence against the free-plan ceilings (500 sites, 10GB, 60 publishes/hour).
novel_features.rationale: Rolls up synced sites and drives against free-tier limits entirely locally — the health signal that analytics paywalls.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to stay under the free-plan caps without paying for analytics; it's the free user's only proactive limit signal.

novel_features.name: Stale-site finder
novel_features.description: Lists sites not updated in N days from the local mirror, so you can reclaim free-plan slots by deleting dead ones.
novel_features.rationale: Time-window query over the local sites mirror; no free API surface ranks sites by staleness.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Run this near the 500-site free cap to find which sites to prune.

narrative.headline: Publish a folder to a live URL in one command, mirror your Drives offline, and never lose an anonymous site to the 24-hour clock.
narrative.value_prop: here.now lets agents publish static Sites to live URLs and keep private files in cloud Drives. This CLI is the missing layer on top: `publish dir ./site` orchestrates the whole inline-upload-finalize dance for you, `drives sync` pushes only what changed, and a local claim-token vault keeps your free-tier anonymous sites from silently expiring. Built free-plan-first — anonymous publishing needs no account, and paid-only analytics fails soft with a clear message instead of a raw error.
narrative.auth_narrative: Most onboarding is key-less: anonymous publish, public site reads, and Site Data writes work with no credential at all. When you want permanent sites and your own Drives, run `here-now-pp-cli auth login` to do the email-code flow (a one-time code is emailed, you paste it back) and the API key is stored locally, or set HERENOW_API_KEY in your environment. Drive share tokens also authenticate Drive-scoped reads.

quickstart.comment: Health check — confirms reachability and whether you're on the free or paid plan; works with no key.
Preview an anonymous publish of a local folder; no account needed.
See the anonymous sites you've published and their claim tokens before they expire.
Check how close you are to the free-plan limits.

troubleshoots.symptom: analytics command returns a paid-plan error
troubleshoots.fix: Analytics is a paid feature; on the free plan use `here-now-pp-cli usage` for local site/drive/publish-rate stats instead.
Anonymous sites expire after 24h. Run `here-now-pp-cli claims expiring --within 6h` regularly and `here-now-pp-cli sites claim <slug>` to make them permanent.

troubleshoots.symptom: publish failed partway with files uploaded but no live URL
troubleshoots.fix: Run `here-now-pp-cli publish resume <slug>` to finalize the existing upload instead of republishing.

troubleshoots.symptom: presigned upload URL expired during a large publish
troubleshoots.fix: Run `here-now-pp-cli sites refresh-uploads <slug>` to get fresh upload targets, then resume.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for this CLI whenever an agent needs to turn generated content into a live URL, manage private Drive files, or read back Site Data form submissions. It is the right tool for free-tier-heavy workflows: anonymous-publish-and-claim, drives sync, and staying under plan limits without paid analytics. Prefer it over raw API calls when publishing a directory, syncing files to a Drive, or tracking which anonymous sites still need claiming.

recipes.title: Publish a folder and keep it permanently
recipes.command: here-now-pp-cli publish dir ./site --anon && here-now-pp-cli claims expiring --within 24h
recipes.explanation: Publish anonymously for a live URL, then see the claim window so you can `sites claim` before it expires.

recipes.title: Sync a working folder to your Drive
recipes.explanation: Uploads only files that changed since the last sync, computed from local sha256 vs the mirror.

recipes.title: Read form submissions from a site's collection
recipes.command: here-now-pp-cli publishes data list-site-records my-site signups --json --select id,data,createdAt
recipes.explanation: List a site's Site Data records with field selection so the agent's context stays small on deeply nested records.

recipes.title: Find sites to prune before hitting the free cap
recipes.explanation: Lists the least-recently-updated sites so you can reclaim free-plan slots.

recipes.title: Check free-plan headroom
recipes.explanation: Local rollup of site count, drive bytes, and publish cadence against free-tier limits — no paid analytics required.

trigger_phrases: sync this folder to my here.now drive
what here.now sites are about to expire
how close am I to the here.now free plan limit
